zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Béthune於大約1135年出生時，她的父親Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras42歲，母親Clémence d'Oisy34歲。她和Everard III Ralph de Mortagne至少有2個女兒。她去世於1191年之後。

zh-hans.Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Béthune于大约1135年出生时，她的父亲Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras42岁，母亲Clémence d'Oisy34岁。她和Everard III Ralph de Mortagne至少有2个女儿。她去世于1191年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béthune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Béthune was born about 1135, her father, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, was 42 and her mother, Clémence d'Oisy, was 34. She had at least 2 daughters with Everard III Ralph de Mortagne. She died after 1191.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Béthune est née environ 1135, son père, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Clémence d'Oisy, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Everard III Ralph de Mortagne. Elle est décédée après 1191.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Béthune um 1135 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras 42 und ihre Mutter Clémence d'Oisy 34. Sie hatte mit Everard III Ralph de Mortagne mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1191.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Béthune è nata il circa 1135, sua padre, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Clémence d'Oisy, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Everard III Ralph de Mortagne. Morì dopo il 1191.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Béthuneが約1135年に生まれた時，父Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arrasは42歳，母Clémence d'Oisyは34歳であった。彼女はEverard III Ralph de Mortagneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1191年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Béthune(이)가 대략 1135년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clémence d'Oisy(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Everard III Ralph de Mortagne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Béthune nasceu aproximadamente 1135, seu pai, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Clémence d'Oisy, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Everard III Ralph de Mortagne. Ela faleceu após 1191.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Béthune родилась около 1135 г., её отцу по имени Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Clémence d'Oisy, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Everard III Ralph de Mortagne. Она умерла после 1191 г.

sm.about 1135–nach 1191: e tusa o le 1135–ina ua ma'ea le 1191

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Béthune nació aproximadamente 1135, su papá, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Clémence d'Oisy, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Everard III Ralph de Mortagne. Murió después de 1191.
